problem.title: Why Pado Exists
problem.intro: Modern DeFi is powerful — but fragmented.

points.title: Fragmented Capital
points.description: Users manage multiple wallets and lock capital into isolated pools for trading, lending, or payments — reducing capital efficiency and increasing operational risk.

points.title: Protocol Sprawl
points.description: Each DeFi vertical — DEXs, perpetuals, lending protocols, staking — operates in isolation, forcing users to bridge liquidity and accept inconsistent custody assumptions.

points.title: Context Switching
points.description: Discussion and coordination happen off-platform — on X, Discord, and Telegram — far from execution. Insight rarely becomes action in time.

points.title: No Shared Financial Context
points.description: Existing platforms separate execution from information. Users constantly switch between trading interfaces and external channels to learn, coordinate, and compete.

problem.closing: Pado consolidates these functions into a single onchain financial system — one account with shared collateral, deterministic risk management, and embedded financial context.

coreInnovation.title: The Core Innovation
coreInnovation.subtitle: One Account, One Risk Engine
coreInnovation.intro: At the center of Pado is a Smart Account that represents a user's complete financial state.

features.title: Portfolio-Level Risk
features.description: All assets, positions, and liabilities are evaluated at the portfolio level — not per protocol, not per product. One unified view of your entire financial exposure.

features.title: Deterministic Enforcement
features.description: Risk is enforced deterministically onchain — no discretionary liquidations, no hidden rules. The same transparent rules apply to everyone.

features.title: Yield on Collateral
features.description: Lending contracts are deployed on devnet, enabling collateral to earn yield while backing positions. As lending markets activate, capital efficiency will match centralized exchanges — without the custody trade-off.

coreInnovation.closing: This architecture delivers centralized-exchange capital efficiency — without custody, opaque controls, or fragmented workflows.

features.title: Unified Margin
features.description: Cross-collateral margin across spot, perpetuals, and prediction markets. Your entire portfolio backs all positions simultaneously — no capital locked in silos.

features.title: Protocol-Native Execution
features.description: Sub-second finality and parallel execution on Nasun L1. Conditional orders (TP/SL, trailing stops) will be upgraded to validator-native execution — removing off-chain dependencies entirely.

features.title: AI-Integrated Intent Solvers
features.description: AI agents that interpret user intent, optimize execution, and coordinate across markets — replacing manual workflows with protocol-native automation.

features.title: Embedded Social Layer
features.description: Global chat with signature-based authentication, AI market narrator Wavi, leaderboards with trader profiles, PnL share cards, competitions, and a points system — all integrated into the trading interface.

trading.title: Spot Trading
features: 4 trading pairs on a full CLOB orderbook powered by DeepBook V3
TP/SL and trailing stops with keeper and browser fallback

perps.title: Perpetual Futures
features: Up to 20x leverage with 8-hour funding rates
Same unified account — shared collateral across spot and perps

prediction.title: Prediction Markets
features: YES/NO outcome orderbooks with admin-resolved settlement
Trade on verifiable events with transparent odds

lottery.title: Weekly Lottery
features: Verifiable onchain randomness for provably fair draws
Multi-tier prizes with weekly rollover jackpots
Admin-resolved draws today — oracle-based automation on roadmap

lending.title: Lending & Staking
features: Stake to earn protocol rewards and secure the network

social.title: Social & Community
features: Global chat, leaderboards, and real-time PnL sharing
AI market narrator Wavi with real-time trade alerts
Competitions and points system built into the execution layer

contextualFinance.title: Contextual Finance
contextualFinance.subtitle: The Social Layer for Serious Capital
contextualFinance.intro: Finance is inherently social — traders compare performance, share strategies, learn from peers, and compete. Today, these interactions happen outside the execution layer, across disconnected platforms with no shared context or verification.
contextualFinance.inversion: Pado inverts this model. Instead of injecting financial mechanics into social feeds, Pado embeds optional, high-signal social surfaces directly into the financial execution layer — eliminating context switching while preserving privacy and focus.
contextualFinance.designPrinciple: Social features must make users better traders, better allocators, or better learners. If they don't, they don't ship.

features.title: Live Chat & AI Narrator
features.description: Global chat with signature-based authentication. AI market narrator Wavi delivers real-time trade alerts and market commentary.

features.title: News Feed
features.description: Real-time crypto news integrated into the trading interface. Discuss and trade without leaving the app.

features.title: War Rooms
features.description: Position-gated discussion spaces designed to filter noise through skin-in-the-game participation.

features.title: Leaderboards
features.description: Risk-adjusted performance rankings with opt-in privacy controls. Designed to reward discipline over speculation.

features.title: Copy Trading
features.description: Follow and automatically replicate the trades of top-performing traders. Transparent track records ensure informed decisions.

features.title: Secure Messaging
features.description: Direct messaging between traders with end-to-end encryption and built-in risk controls. No forced exposure, no open spam channels.

features.title: AI Agents as Financial Tools
features.description: AI agents that interpret user intent, optimize execution, and coordinate across markets — from risk alerts and strategy simulations to guided onboarding.

koreaMarket.title: Global Product, Korea Market Entry
koreaMarket.intro: Pado is a global unified onchain finance application. Our regional entry strategy begins with South Korea — one of the world's most concentrated and active crypto markets.

items.label: The strategy
items.description: Establish a Korean legal entity and secure VASP registration aligned with mainnet launch. Enter with self-custodial spot trading as the compliant entry point — a service Korean traders need and regulators can approve.

items.label: The regulatory landscape
items.description: South Korea ended a nine-year ban on corporate crypto trading in February 2026. An estimated $110B in Korean capital moved offshore — yet no self-custodial trading venue exists domestically. As regulations evolve, Pado's full feature suite is ready to unlock market by market.

items.label: The long-term vision
items.description: Korea is the first market, not the only market. The same compliance-first playbook — local entity, VASP registration, progressive feature rollout — scales to every jurisdiction where onchain finance is gaining regulatory clarity.

launchStatus.title: Launch Status
launchStatus.intro: Pado Alpha is live on Nasun devnet. Validating core logic through continuous iteration.

live.title: Smart Account
live.description: zkLogin (Google OAuth) and Passkey authentication with biometric login. Social recovery in testing. No seed phrases required.

live.title: Spot Trading
live.description: DeepBook V3 CLOB with 4 markets. TradingView charts, TP/SL orders, trailing stops.

live.title: Global Chat & AI Bot
live.description: Signature-based chat with AI market narrator Wavi. Leaderboards, PnL sharing, and competitions.

live.title: Portfolio Dashboard
live.description: PnL equity curves, per-market stats, risk metrics, and CSV export.

live.title: Weekly Lottery
live.description: Multi-tier prizes with verifiable onchain randomness. Ticket purchase verified.

live.title: Prediction Markets
live.description: YES/NO outcome orderbooks with admin-resolved settlement. Contracts and UI complete.

live.title: News Feed
live.description: Real-time crypto news integrated into the trading interface. Discuss and trade in context.

deployed.title: Perpetual Futures
deployed.description: 20x leverage with 8-hour funding rates. Contracts and UI complete. LP liquidity activation pending.

deployed.title: Leaderboard
deployed.description: On-chain performance rankings with verifiable data. Risk-adjusted metrics and opt-in privacy controls.

coming.title: Lending & Staking
coming.description: Earn yield on idle assets and stake for protocol rewards. Contracts deployed on devnet.

coming.title: Protocol-Level Conditional Orders
coming.description: Validator-level TP/SL execution — eliminating keeper bot dependency.

coming.title: Advanced Social

unified.intro: Pado Alpha is live on Nasun devnet. Validating core logic through continuous iteration.

downloadCta.title: Want the Full Picture?
downloadCta.description: Download the pitchdeck for the investor narrative, or the litepaper for the complete technical and economic vision.

cta.title: The Opportunity
cta.body: As DeFi matures, users are migrating toward platforms that offer fewer accounts, shared collateral, transparent risk, and integrated execution. Korean crypto participants — 16 million strong — have no credible onchain venue for self-custody and transparent price discovery. Pado is built for this transition.
cta.tagline: One account. One margin system. One execution layer.
cta.closing: A financial platform designed for scale, safety, capital efficiency — and context.
cta.motto: Start simple. Grow sophisticated. Always in control.

footer.badge: Built on Nasun L1 · Move-based · Self-custodial · Apache 2.0
